text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fan votes have been tallied, and Grass
Wonder has earned a slot in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The showdown with Maruzensky is at hand, and
Grass Wonder can barely contain her excitement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, Maruzensky suffers an injury while
training and is forced to withdraw from the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What's more, Grass Wonder learns that
Maruzensky had intended the Arima Kinen to be
her last race in the Twinkle Series.
